# BioRender MCP Server

Create and edit scientific figures, diagrams, and illustrations using BioRender's AI-assisted design tools.

## Access

Requires a **BioRender account** with an active subscription. OAuth authentication is handled through the MCP connection flow.

## Setup

```json
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "biorender": {
      "type": "http",
      "url": "https://mcp.services.biorender.com/mcp"
    }
  }
}
```

## Capabilities

- Create scientific figures with professional-quality icons
- Generate pathway diagrams and cell biology illustrations
- Edit existing BioRender projects programmatically

## Source

Maintained by [BioRender](https://www.biorender.com/).
